name: ASRock B850 PRO RS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - M.2 (Key E) - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C (DP Alt mode) - HDMI 2.1 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - 802.11axe Wi-Fi 6E - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C

description: ASRock B850 PRO RS WIFI ATX motherboard with AM5 socket, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 6E for professional AMD systems.
